description: Legal record (#36). Liquidation of a trust. Revised copy of Yevr.-Arab. I 1700.15, recto. See PGPID 9395 for summary. Witnesses: Ḥiyya b. Yiṣḥaq. Efrayim b. Meshullam. There are two lines in Arabic script underneath this record at 90 degrees which need examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
